content.rendered:
Bus-Based Public Transit Systems

Our Service Includes:
  • Bus service and operations plan
  • Infrastructure planning and designing
  • Implementation and business plan
  • Procurement planning and transaction advisory
  • Institutional development and capacity building
  • Branding and communications
Bus Rapid Transit (BRT) Services
  • Operation Plan and Project Management Consultancy (PMC) for BRT System- Surat (40 Km)
  • Detailed Project Report and Project Management Consultancy for BRT System- Amritsar (31 km)
  • Detailed Project Report and Project Management Consultancy for BRT System- Rajkot (30 km)
  • Detailed Project Report and Project Management Consultancy for BRT System- Ludhiana (28 km)
  • Feasibility Study for Grade Separated BRT System- Delhi, India (East –West Corridor) (21 km)
  • Detailed Project Report of Pilot Corridor of BRT System- Pune (17 km)
  • Detailed Project Report for BRT System- Guwahati (11 km)
  • Operational Plan and Detailed Project Report of BRT System- Pune
  • Handholding of bus operations under Amritsar BRTS project
City Bus Services (CBS)
  • Advisory services for the development of CBS in Patna, Guwahati, Raipur, Bhubaneswar, Puri, Ranchi, Jamshedpur, Dhanbad and Bhopal
  • Detailed project report for funding of buses under JNNURM (2013) for 68 cities in India
  • Detailed project report for funding of buses under JNNURM (2009) for 34 cities in India
  • Detailed project report under GEF- efficient and sustainable CBS for Mira-Bhayander city
  • Management of operations of CBS- Nagpur
  • Business plan for a feeder bus service to the Delhi Metro Rail Corporation (DMRC)- Delhi
  • Planning, implementation and operations of ‘Hop on Hop off’ (HoHo) tour bus services- Delhi
  • Preparation of Multi-Model Public Transport Implementation and Operational Plan for Noida city and Greater Noida – Noida connectivity
  • DPR for Electric Buses in Kohima, Nagaland
  • PR for “Electric PT System” under Smart City Projects, Kakinada
  • Implementation Consultant Services for Climate Friendly Modernization of Bus Service in major cities of Tamil Nadu
